title: leontopodium suffruticosum
intro: Leontopodium suffruticosum, also known as Himalayan Eritrichium, is a flowering plant species native to the Himalayan region, characterized by its compact, shrub-like growth habit and small, bell-shaped flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of eriodictyol and other flavonoids. The health benefits of Leontopodium suffruticosum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and exhibit antioxidant properties, making it a sought-after herb in traditional medicine. Leontopodium suffruticosum is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and is used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
